explanations.3: The 'schedule' keyword tells GitHub to run this workflow automatically on a timer, like a scheduled task on your computer.
explanations.4: This cron expression means 'every Monday at noon UTC'—the five numbers represent minute, hour, day-of-month, month, and day-of-week.
explanations.5: workflow_dispatch lets someone manually trigger this workflow by clicking a button in the GitHub UI, not just waiting for the schedule.
explanations.22: The comment_tag_name is a marker that the action will search for in your README file to know exactly where to insert the blog posts.
